title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Failure Case: Required Status
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates required status increment in a required CI quality-gate workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Connect stable named checks to branch protection and define cancellation and rerun policy.
Use dependency caches and test artifacts without trusting executable output across boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Required Status evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-required-status-besm4: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Required Status into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-required-status-besm4:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
